title: Update Bodyshape Fitness website with correct location, remove incorrect services, add 20th anniversary celebration, and replace all images with actual gym photos

requirements.summary: Update Locations page to display Independence, Kentucky location with correct address, phone (363-8900), and hours
acceptanceCriteria: Locations page shows 'Independence, Kentucky' as the gym location
No references to 'Dallas, Texas' appear anywhere on the website
Phone number 363-8900 is displayed on the Locations page
Address and hours match the Independence, Kentucky location

file_operations.description: Update location data to show Independence, Kentucky instead of Dallas, Texas. Change address to the correct Kentucky location, update phone number to 363-8900, and ensure operating hours are accurate for the Independence location. Remove all Dallas references.
Update footer contact information to show Independence, Kentucky address and phone number 363-8900 instead of any Dallas references.

requirements.summary: Remove all references to personal training services from the website
acceptanceCriteria: No text mentioning 'personal training' appears on the homepage
Services section does not list personal training as an offering
Information cards do not reference personal training
All content accurately reflects services actually offered

file_operations.description: Remove any references to personal training from hero content, info cards, and service descriptions. Update info cards to highlight only services that are actually offered (equipment access, facility amenities, etc.).

requirements.summary: Remove all Spanish language references and offerings from the website
acceptanceCriteria: No Spanish language content appears anywhere on the site
No references to Spanish language services or support
All content is in English only

file_operations.description: Remove any Spanish language content or references to Spanish language services from the homepage content, including info cards and service descriptions.
Remove any Spanish language content or references to Spanish language support from the locations page.
Remove any Spanish language navigation items, links, or references from the header and footer.

requirements.summary: Add prominent 20th anniversary celebration message to the homepage
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage features a visible 20th anniversary celebration message
Anniversary information is prominently displayed in the hero section or near the top of the page
Content emphasizes the milestone of 20 years serving the community

file_operations.description: Add a prominent 20th anniversary celebration banner or badge in the hero section. Include messaging that celebrates 20 years of serving the Independence, Kentucky community. Position this message prominently near the top of the page, potentially as a decorative element overlaying or adjacent to the hero image.

requirements.summary: Replace all existing gym images with the 20 newly uploaded actual Bodyshape Fitness photos
acceptanceCriteria: All images on the homepage are replaced with the newly uploaded Bodyshape Fitness photos
Image gallery displays only the actual facility photos from the 20 uploaded images
No placeholder or stock gym images remain on the site
All images show real Bodyshape Fitness equipment, including the red Rogue equipment visible in the uploaded photos

file_operations.description: Replace all existing placeholder/stock images with the 20 actual Bodyshape Fitness facility photos from the assets folder (348s.jpg, 348s (1).jpg through 348s (9).jpg and their -1 variants, plus 01bd025a3bc2b08a666581b45aee8af2c50810d227.jpg and 639485282_1510631077735967_3883468640516476473_n.jpg). Update the gallery to display these real facility images showing the red Rogue equipment, cardio area, weights area, and other gym spaces. Remove references to generated placeholder images.

Replace hero section background image and any other homepage images with actual Bodyshape Fitness facility photos from the uploaded assets (such as 348s.jpg, 348s (1).jpg, etc.). Ensure hero image showcases the modern equipment and facility. Remove all references to generated or stock images.

requirements.summary: Update gym bio and equipment descriptions to highlight modern equipment visible in uploaded photos
acceptanceCriteria: Gym description mentions modern, up-to-date equipment
Content references the variety of strength training and cardio equipment shown in the photos
Equipment descriptions align with what is visible in the uploaded facility images

file_operations.description: Update gym description and equipment highlights to emphasize the modern, high-quality equipment visible in the facility photos. Mention the red Rogue strength training equipment, variety of cardio machines, functional training areas, and other premium equipment shown in the uploaded images. Ensure descriptions accurately reflect what members will see in the actual Independence, Kentucky facility.

Update location description to highlight the modern equipment and facility features visible in the uploaded photos, emphasizing the quality and variety of strength training and cardio equipment available at the Independence location.
